info.title: MCP Context Test
info.description: A test tool to validate WxO passing User Auth headers into a Server-Sent Events MCP connection

servers.description: Ngrok tunnel to Local MCP SSE Server

bearerAuth.description: WxO injects the user Bearer token into Authorization header

get.description: Calls the server and returns the WxO user Authorization Bearer token extracted from HTTP headers. Validates Pattern 1 (Transport Level Context Passing).

username.description: Authenticated user email or subject from JWT
